Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP
South West Wiltshire

Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP

Welcome to my website. I'm Andrew Murrison, the MP for South West Wiltshire. It's an honour to have been the MP for the area since 2001. Here you can find my news, campaigns and more about me, including how to contact my office. I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Want to stay up to date?
